title: Smart Nanodelivery Systems for Immunometabolic Modulation in Osteoarthritis.
snippet: Osteoarthritis (OA) is a chronic degenerative joint disease characterised primarily by immunometabolic disorders within the synovium-cartilage axis. Conventional therapies are limited by poor drug accumulation and nonspecific distribution at lesion sites, resulting in suboptimal and short-lived efficacy. In recent years, smart responsive nanodelivery system...

title: Clinical utility of the prostate health index density in patients with negative mpMRI or prior negative biopsy.
snippet: Multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) has improved prostate cancer (PCa) detection; however, false-negative rates remain non-negligible, particularly among men with PI-RADS 1-2 lesions or those with persistently elevated PSA after a prior negative biopsy (PNB). The Prostate Health Index (PHI) and its volume-adjusted derivative, PHI density (PHID), have emerged as pro...

title: Therapy and biomarker dependent progression-free survival in infant sonic hedgehog medulloblastoma: a multi-national retrospective cohort study.
snippet: Medulloblastoma in infants (iMB; aged < 5 years) presents the challenge of achieving cure while minimising deleterious cranio-spinal irradiation (CSI)-associated late-effects. Non-randomised phase 2 studies have examined upfront CSI omission and chemotherapy intensification for favourable-risk desmoplastic/nodular (DN) tumours associated with the sonic hedg...
